title: The First Law scales equipped creature from opponent hand size

card.rawText: For every card in your opponents hand the equipped creature receives: Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Modifier: +1.

effect.value: For every card in opponents' hand: Atk Dice Rolls +1; Modifier +1

plan.title: The First Law scales equipped creature from opponent hand size
plan.summary: Equip The First Law to a zero-Modifier primary creature and verify it gains one attack die and one Modifier for each card in the opponent's hand.

notes: Equip The First Law to player_1's primary creature.
Use the default opponent hand produced by the headless setup.

steps: Set the zero-Modifier synthetic creature as player_1 primary.
Play and equip The First Law to that creature.
Read the equipped creature's effective attack dice and Modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: The First Law adds attack dice per opponent hand card
The First Law adds Modifier per opponent hand card

manualVerification: Confirm each additional opponent hand card adds another Atk Dice Roll and Modifier.
riskNotes: This fixture locks the default six-card opponent hand from headless setup.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate The First Law opponent hand scaling.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
